hero.title: Okutuukirikika
hero.lead: IATF erina ekigendererwa eky'okuteeka webusayiti eno mu ngeri ennyangu, esomeka obulungi, esobola okukwatibwako ng'okozesa keyboard, era nga ekwatagana n'obukodyo obuyamba.
support: Olw'okutuuka ku mutimbagano, IATF ekozesa [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Obusobozi bw'okutuuka ku bantu mu ngeri ey'omugaso bwesigamiziddwa ne ku bumanyirivu bw'abo abakozesa enkola z'ebikozesebwa okuyamba.

paragraphs: Bw'osanga obuzibu ku kibanja kino, tukusaba okitubuulire ku email:
items: tekinologiya ki ow'obuyambi, browsera, oba ekyuma ky'okozesa, bwe kiba nga kyetaagisa
report.footnote: Tekikwetaagisa kuwandiika lipoota y'ekikyamu mu butongole. Ennyinnyonnyola etegeerekeka emala.

header.title: Okukola ku nsonga ezikwata ku bantu bonna

paragraphs: Ensonga z'okufuna obuyambi ziyinza okuteekebwa mu bulambulukufu mu biwandiiko ebikwatagana n'embeera y'obuntu okusobola okutereezebwa mu lujjudde. Ebintu eby'obwannannyini eby'okutuukirira n'eby'ekyama ebiteetaagisa biggibwawo nga tebinnaba kufulumizibwa.
Bwe kiba nti alipoota yo erimu ebintu eby'ekyama, kyogereko bulungi mu bubaka.
Ekifo kino kyekigendereddwamu okuba ekitono era ekisinga okubeera eky'omulembe. Enkyusa ezimu ez'ennimi ziyinza okuba nga tezituukiridde ng'okuvvuunula kutegekebwa.
